commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces regex-backed `tools.agentToAgent.allow` wildcard matching in `src/plugin-sdk/session-visibility.ts` with a segment-based case-insensitive matcher and adds focused session-access tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection ties the reported regex construction to `tools.agentToAgent.allow`, and a focused Node check using the same regex shape timed out after 5 seconds on current-main behavior.
commands.review_followup: No automated code repair is needed; maintainer/security review and contributor-supplied source-path proof are the remaining gates.

target.title: fix(security): replace regex wildcard matching with linear-time glob in session-visibility
